notes: STALE SOURCE: registry md dated ~April 2026 (reconciliation pass 2026-04-05); its open/closed counts are NOT ground truth. This preview is metadata-only (no bodies/comments dumped). 148 JSON files live under comms/*/issues_prs/: 139 are per-artifact issue/PR records (dicts with number/state/title/url) and 9 are search-result/commit-dump files (JSON lists or NDJSON) that are NOT per-artifact and were excluded from `artifacts` (listed in rollups.nonartifact_files_search_commits). The 9 excluded: astropy/atom/cereggii/enaml/kiwi/pyhacl search_results, lxml_recent_commits, regex_commits_since_march21, traits_search_results. traits #1881 is DUPLICATED across two filenames (issue_1881.json + traits_issue_1881.json) -> 139 records but 138 unique URLs (see duplicates_detail). tool_guess: source lives in cext-review-toolkit/comms and the registry is the cext campaign registry, so default is 'cext'; artifacts whose TITLE references free-threading/data-race/GIL/atomic/thread-safety are marked 'cext-or-ft' (the registry unifies the cext + ft campaigns and carries no per-artifact tool tag). `ext` = on-disk comms/ directory name (dir 'kiwi' == registry 'kiwisolver'; 'zope_interface' == 'zope.interface'; 'pillow'=='Pillow'; 'cython'=='Cython'). `repo` derived from each artifact's url. Extensions present on disk with NO issues_prs (communicated only, per registry): astropy, cereggii, cffi, cvxopt, isal, ml-dtypes, msgspec, mypyc, nanobind, pybind, pyerfa, pymongo, wrapt, awkward-cpp.
